text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon finishes the Kikuka Sho with
favorable results.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta say, Agnes Tachyon performed better
than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she ran with all her heart. Is she really a
problem child like they say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's full sprint has inspired a change
of heart in those watching her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Haha... AHAHAHA! Not bad! Not bad at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile is so bright that I unconsciously take a
step back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I think so too! If only I could copy the
memory from my mind and save it somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Either way, this is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. It's time I fulfilled my promise to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Once you're ready, let's meet in your office. I
have something to tell you.
